summary: Re-test after Quiz.jsx mode-derivation fix and GPCS→GPSC typo fix. All previously failing frontend flows now pass. Practice quiz completes end-to-end and reaches Result page with correct data. Full Mock loads 70 questions with 120:00 timer. Result page shows 'GPSC Selection Probability' (no GPCS typo). Leaderboard filters and logout work.

issues: Recharts console warnings 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' — cosmetic only, chart renders fine after mount. Consider setting explicit min-height on ResponsiveContainer parent.

critical_code_review_comments: Quiz.jsx mode derivation via location.pathname.includes('/quiz/mock') is a working fix but brittle if routes change; consider adding :mode segment for explicitness.
Recharts ResponsiveContainer briefly reports width=-1/height=-1 during mount — set min-height on parent to silence warnings.
test_credentials: Name-based login only. Used 'QA Tester Round 2'.
seed_data_creation: None new — used existing seeded 70 questions and test users from iteration 1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All primary flows verified: (a) name entry → dashboard (b) practice quiz history → 10 Qs answered → Result page with Net Score 2.02, probability label, radar SVG (11 svgs), 3 CTAs → POST /api/results succeeded (no 422) (c) Full Mock → /quiz/mock loads Q1/70 with 120:00 timer (d) Result page label reads 'GPSC Selection Probability' (uppercase via CSS) — no 'GPCS' typo (e) Net score updates in top-right (-0.33 per wrong, +1 correct — verified: -0.33,-0.66,-0.99,+0.01) (f) Instant feedback: explanation shown with correct/wrong styling (g) Leaderboard filter chips filter-all/mock/practice all work (h) Logout on dashboard redirects to /. Fixes are stable.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — previous iteration bugs (Quiz.jsx useParams mode undefined; GPCS typo) resolved. Verified in this iteration.
